{{CargoRelic
|name=Cross of Rebirth
|class_id=20227
|rank=Green
|affct=FAITH
|source=
|description=This cross can automatically make the holder come back to life within 7 seconds after its death. Once used, the cross will destroy itself, and the resurrected has half the HP and no mana. Multiple similar items can't work at the same time!
|fame=19
|art=13
|fth=28
|civ=12
|tech=18
|ss1=In all Domains, Troop Casualty -1%
|ss2=In all Domains, Troop Casualty -2%
|ss3=In all Domains, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss4=In all Domains, Troop Casualty -3%
|ss7=In all Domains, Troop Casualty -3%<br> (Awakened)
}}
